name: Oatmeal Chocolate Chip Cooky Bars
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup melted butter or margarine (1 stick)
Optional: 12 oz. butterscotch chips, omit one type of chocolate chips and use the other
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all ingredients by hand in a large mixing bowl.
2. Spread the mixture into a 13x9x2 inch pan.
3. Bake at 375 degrees Fahrenheit for 20 minutes.
4. After baking, sprinkle the chosen chocolate chips on top and spread them evenly.
5. Allow to cool completely.
6. Cut into bars. Yields: approximately 35 bars.
